OAPPDesc: Organisation, team, and role management for OASIS. Enables SOPs to resolve assigned roles to real Avatar identities, manage team membership, control SOP authoring/running permissions, and handle Avatar invite flows for external parties (e.g. customers signing a go-live step). Required infrastructure for multi-party SOP execution.
Author: OASIS_ADMIN

Zomes.Name: OrgZome
Zomes.Description: Organisation and role definitions. OrgHolon is the top-level entity; OrgRoleHolon defines named roles within that org and their SOP permissions.

Holons.Name: OrgHolon
Holons.Description: Top-level organisation record. Owns all team members, roles, and SOP templates created within it. Referenced by SOPHolon.OwnerAvatarId and SOPRunHolon.AssignedAvatarIds.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier — consistent across all storage providers.

Fields.Name: ParentHolonId
Fields.Description: COSMIC parent — typically the Avatar of the org owner.

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.Description: Organisation display name, e.g. 'Acme Corp' or 'TMRW Capital'.

Fields.Name: Domain
Fields.Description: Primary email domain, e.g. 'acme.com'. Used for SSO matching.

Fields.Name: OwnerAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar with admin control over this org.

Fields.Name: SubscriptionTier
Fields.Description: Controls how many SOPs can be active, SOP run limits, and STARNET publish permissions.

Fields.Name: MaxActiveSOPs
Fields.Description: Number of concurrent active SOP definitions allowed.

Fields.Name: SSOProvider
Fields.Description: Single Sign-On provider for this org.

Fields.Name: SSOClientId
Fields.Description: OAuth Client ID for the configured SSO provider.

Fields.Name: SSOTenantId
Fields.Description: Tenant/directory ID for Microsoft or Okta SSO.

Fields.Name: LogoUrl
Fields.Description: URL to the org's logo — displayed in SOPRunner and SOPIntel headers.

Fields.Name: PrimaryColor
Fields.Description: Brand hex color for white-label SOPRunner/Intel theming.

Fields.Name: DefaultSOPTimeoutMins
Fields.Description: Org-wide fallback timeout if not set per step.

Fields.Name: NotifyOnDeviation
Fields.Description: Send Slack/email alert to org admin on every Critical deviation.

Fields.Name: NotificationWebhookUrl
Fields.Description: Webhook URL for org-wide deviation and completion alerts.

Fields.Name: CreatedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who created this org record.

Fields.Name: CreatedOn
Fields.Description: Timestamp of creation.

Fields.Name: IsActive
Fields.Description: Whether this org subscription is active.

Holons.Name: OrgRoleHolon
Holons.Description: A named role within an organisation — maps to SOP step AssignedRole fields. Defines what Avatars with this role can do (author SOPs, run SOPs, view analytics, admin).

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: OrgId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent OrgHolon.

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.Description: Role name — must match exactly to SOPStepHolon.AssignedRole for routing. e.g. 'CustomerSuccessManager', 'SolutionsEngineer', 'CustomerAdmin'.

Fields.Name: DisplayName
Fields.Description: Human-friendly label shown in SOPRunner, e.g. 'Customer Success Manager'.

Fields.Name: Description
Fields.Description: What this role does and which SOPs they typically participate in.

Fields.Name: CanAuthorSOPs
Fields.Description: Can create and publish SOP templates.

Fields.Name: CanRunSOPs
Fields.Description: Can start new SOP runs.

Fields.Name: CanViewIntel
Fields.Description: Can access SOPIntel analytics dashboard.

Fields.Name: CanApproveVersions
Fields.Description: Can approve AI-proposed SOPVersionHolon upgrades.

Fields.Name: IsAdmin
Fields.Description: Full admin access — manage members, roles, integrations, billing.

Fields.Name: IsExternalRole
Fields.Description: True for roles filled by people outside the org (e.g. customers, auditors, suppliers) — invited via OrgInviteHolon.

Fields.Name: Color
Fields.Description: Hex color for this role's Avatar tag in SOPRunner UI.

Zomes.Name: MemberZome
Zomes.Description: Avatar-to-organisation membership and invite management. OrgMemberHolon links an OASIS Avatar to an org and role. OrgInviteHolon handles the pending invite flow before the Avatar accepts.

Holons.Name: OrgMemberHolon
Holons.Description: Links an OASIS Avatar to an organisation and one or more roles. Created when an invite is accepted or SSO first-login occurs. The SOP runtime queries this to resolve which Avatars can complete a step with a given AssignedRole.

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: OrgId
Fields.Description: FK to the parent OrgHolon.

Fields.Name: AvatarId
Fields.Description: FK to the OASIS Avatar (from Avatar system).

Fields.Name: RoleIds
Fields.Description: List of OrgRoleHolon IDs assigned to this member. Members can hold multiple roles.

Fields.Name: RoleNames
Fields.Description: Denormalised role name list — enables fast SOP runtime lookup without join. Kept in sync with RoleIds.

Fields.Name: Status
Fields.Description: Active = full access; Suspended = read-only; Pending = invite not yet accepted.

Fields.Name: JoinedVia
Fields.Description: How this member joined the org.

Fields.Name: InviteId
Fields.Description: FK to the OrgInviteHolon if joined via invite.

Fields.Name: LastActiveAt
Fields.Description: Most recent SOPRun interaction timestamp.

Fields.Name: JoinedOn
Fields.Description: When this membership was created.

Fields.Name: NotifyByEmail
Fields.Description: Whether this member receives email step-assignment notifications.

Fields.Name: NotifyBySlack
Fields.Description: Whether this member receives Slack step-assignment DMs.

Fields.Name: SlackUserId
Fields.Description: Slack User ID for direct message notifications.

Holons.Name: OrgInviteHolon
Holons.Description: A pending invite to join an organisation. Sent via email with a unique token. On acceptance, an OASIS Avatar is created or linked and an OrgMemberHolon is created. Supports external party invites (customers signing go-live steps, auditors reviewing compliance SOPs).

Fields.Name: Id
Fields.Description: Canonical identifier.

Fields.Name: OrgId
Fields.Description: FK to the OrgHolon the invitee is being added to.

Fields.Name: Email
Fields.Description: Email address the invite was sent to.

Fields.Name: DisplayName
Fields.Description: Invitee's name (pre-filled from the inviting user's input).

Fields.Name: RoleId
Fields.Description: FK to the OrgRoleHolon being granted on acceptance.

Fields.Name: RoleName
Fields.Description: Denormalised role name for quick display.

Fields.Name: InviteToken
Fields.Description: Cryptographically secure random token — embedded in invite link.

Fields.Name: InviteUrl
Fields.Description: Full invite acceptance URL, e.g. https://sop.oasisweb4.com/join/{token}.

Fields.Name: SOPRunId
Fields.Description: FK to SOPRunHolon if this invite was created to allow an external party to sign a specific SOP step.

Fields.Name: SOPStepId
Fields.Description: FK to the specific SOPStepHolon the external party needs to sign or complete.

Fields.Name: InvitedByAvatarId
Fields.Description: Avatar who sent this invite.

Fields.Name: Status
Fields.Description: Current state of the invite.

Fields.Name: ExpiresAt
Fields.Description: Invite link expiry — default 7 days for member invites, 24 hours for SOP sign-off invites.

Fields.Name: AcceptedAt
Fields.Description: When the invite was accepted and the Avatar/member record was created.

Fields.Name: CreatedAvatarId
Fields.Description: The OASIS Avatar ID created or linked when this invite was accepted.

Fields.Name: SentAt
Fields.Description: When the invite email was dispatched.
